headline: Ralph Lauren cashes in on luxury boom with record sales, shares jump
summary: Investing.com -- Luxury fashion giant Ralph Lauren delivered stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings, driven by robust consumer demand across Asia and Europe, higher full-price sales, and continued digital growth, sending shares up nearly 10% in premarket trading.

headline: Ralph Lauren’s (NYSE:RL) Q1 CY2026: Beats On Revenue, Stock Soars
summary: Fashion brand Ralph Lauren (NYSE:RL) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 16.6% year on year to $1.98 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.80 per share was 10.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
